article_title: Anthropic Raises $65 Billion Series H at $965 Billion Valuation, Overtaking OpenAI as World's Most Valuable AI Startup

content_preview.title: Anthropic Raises $65 Billion Series H at $965 Billion Valuation, Overtaking OpenAI as World's Most Valuable AI Startup
content_preview.summary: Anthropic's Series H puts it within striking distance of a $1 trillion valuation on $47 billion run-rate revenue, with Altimeter, Sequoia, GIC, and two dozen other institutions as backers.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H funding round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, the company [announced on May 28](https://www.anthropic.com/news/series-h). The raise is one of the largest single private funding rounds on record and puts the San Francisco-based AI safety company within striking distance of a $1 trillion valuation — overtaking OpenAI, which last raised at an $852 billion valuation in March 2026, [according to TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/0...

editor_notes.content_quality: Concise, well-organized funding news article. 524 words is slightly lean for the News category (400-1200 word range) but acceptable given the direct primary source. All key financial details covered.
editor_notes.source_verification: source-0.html.gz (Anthropic official announcement): confirmed $65B raise, $965B post-money valuation, all lead/co-lead/participant investors, Micron/Samsung/SK hynix strategic partners, $47B run-rate revenue, infrastructure commitments (5GW Amazon, 5GW Google+Broadcom TPU, SpaceX Colossus 1 and 2), CFO Krishna Rao quote verbatim, Series G in February reference. source-1.html.gz (TechCrunch): confirmed $15B previously committed hyperscaler investments, $5B Amazon, OpenAI $852B at $122B round in March 2026, 130% revenue surge to first operating profit, Brad Gerstner quote verbatim.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All financial figures, investor names, revenue metrics, and quotes verified verbatim. 'Overtaking OpenAI as World's Most Valuable AI Startup' headline claim is supported: $965B > OpenAI's last known $852B valuation (TechCrunch). Both internal links verified as existing articles. No fabrications detected.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. No promotional language despite writing about a major company announcement.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Anthropic Series H articles in archive. Novel coverage.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean, well-sourced funding announcement article. APPROVE.
